text:
Oops forgot LICENSE in this patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@
 MAINTAINER=    rum1cro@yandex.ru
 COMMENT=       CVS pserver daemon

+LICENSE=       GPLv2
+
 EXTRA_PATCHES= ${FILESDIR}/extra-cvsd-buildroot.in

 USES=          perl5

http://m1cro.tk/ports/devel/cvsd/cvsd_STAGING.patch have correct patch

With Best Regards,
Ilya A. Arkhipov
